A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### Expected vs actual behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen and what

### Logs

Paste any relevant output. If the bug isn't obvious, re-run the command with
`--verbose` and include the output. **Redact tokens, API keys, and service
account details before pasting.**

> If this is a security issue, **do not report it here** — see
> [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/andrespd99/fireauth/blob/main/SECURITY.md)
> for the responsible disclosure process.
